name: Limited Survive
author: Poki
description: Get ready for some intense hack-and-slash action! Limited Survive is an action survival game set in a hand-drawn setting, where you aim to defeat waves of enemies within a limited amount of time. There are multiple levels for you to conquer, each one bringing ever-increasing challenges for you to encounter. In each attempt you can gather heaps of gold to upgrade your skills, or to unlock weapons or cosmetics. Are you ready to push your limits in order to survive? How do I play Limited Survive? Move by using the WASD, arrow keys, or by clicking and draging with the mouse. Select different upgrades by clicking on the screen with your mouse. Who created Limited Survive? Limited Survive is created by Kool Games. Play their other games on Poki: Skibidi Shooter and Stick Fortress ! How can I play Limited Survive for free? You can play Limited Survive for free on Poki. Can I play Limited Survive on mobile devices and desktop? Limited Survive can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
